civic_duty.question: Should the country require 12 months of national service for 18–25-year-olds—with no corporate exemptions—and penalize employers who discourage participation?

privacy.question: Should police be allowed to run warrantless real-time facial recognition in public spaces and at labor protests, with footage retained for years?

speech.question: Should platforms be required to downrank or remove lawful but harmful posts—including strike calls and boycott campaigns—whenever a certified fact-checker flags them as misinformation?

health.question: Should schools bar unvaccinated children from in-person attendance regardless of parental objection or employment hardship?

justice.question: Should juries be allowed to replace prison with paid restitution and mandatory community service for some nonviolent felonies such as shoplifting rings or payroll fraud?

ai_governance.question: Should AI systems be legally required to disclose they are non-human in every interaction—including hiring, scheduling, and discipline decisions—with fines per undisclosed contact?

urban_life.question: Should cities remove curb parking on commercial corridors to install 24/7 bus and bike lanes even if it cuts deliveries and foot traffic for small businesses?

education.question: Should public schools provide comprehensive sex education starting by grade 5—including contraception and consent—overriding parental opt-out policies?

housing.question: Should cities abolish single-family-only zoning within one mile of transit and bar HOAs from vetoing by-right duplex and triplex construction?

environment.question: Should cities ban gas leaf blowers and other small gasoline engines within 12 months, with fines levied on employers rather than individual workers?

work.question: Should employers be allowed to lay off workers at will to boost profits and finance stock buybacks or executive bonuses—even after receiving public subsidies?

culture.question: Should publicly funded art be allowed to depict or deface religious or national symbols on government property, protected from removal by officials?
